level_signals: Expected to define long-term AI vision and influence cross-functional alignment

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience with direct experience leading AI/ML or applied intelligence products from concept to production with measurable impact.
Deep technical fluency in how modern ML systems are trained, evaluated, deployed, and monitored, with the ability to engage confidently with engineers and data scientists.
Strategic and executional range. Skilled at defining long-term AI vision while delivering near-term experiments, prototypes, and launches.
Platform mindset and experience building scalable developer or data platforms through well-designed primitives, APIs, and frameworks.
Strong communicator and influencer who can translate complex AI concepts into clear narratives and decisions for technical and non-technical audiences.
Commitment to responsible AI and transparency, especially in regulated or high-trust domains.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: [Nice to Have] Hands-on experience with LLMs, embeddings, or agentic systems in production.
[Nice to Have] Familiarity with applied AI in regulated or high-trust domains such as fintech, identity, or risk.

scope.surface: AI Foundations — core AI and data foundation layer including embeddings, representation learning, model training/evaluation pipelines, and APIs delivering intelligence across Plaid's ecosystem
scope.business_model: B2B developer platform / financial data infrastructure
primary_metrics_inferred: Scale and reliability of AI infrastructure across Plaid's ecosystem
Measurable impact of AI/ML product launches
core_responsibilities: Define the strategy, roadmap, and success metrics for Plaid's core AI and data foundation
Partner with Engineering and Data Science to design scalable AI systems, from model training and evaluation pipelines to APIs
Drive initiatives from concept to production, balancing rapid experimentation with reliability, transparency, and responsible AI practices
Work closely with research, platform, and product teams to embed AI capabilities across Plaid's products and developer platform
Use metrics, model performance data, and customer feedback to validate impact and inform prioritization
Translate complex AI concepts into clear narratives and tradeoffs for technical and non-technical stakeholders

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (AI Foundations platform)
Explicitly signals that strong qualifications can come from lived experiences and encourages applications even if not a perfect match
Mission-driven company with stated goal of unlocking financial freedom for everyone
Role spans both strategic vision and hands-on execution — signal of meaningful ownership
Explicit call-out of responsible AI and transparency as a core requirement reflects cultural maturity
red_flags: Location/remote policy not stated in JD body — unclear whether hybrid or fully onsite required
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
8+ years hard requirement is a high bar; no equivalency clause offered for this requirement
No team size or org context provided
